inputs.label: Deck Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of cards in the deck.

inputs.label: Successes in Deck
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards in the deck that are considered favorable outcomes.

inputs.label: Number of Draws
inputs.businessContext: Number of cards drawn from the deck without replacement.

inputs.label: Wanted Successes
inputs.businessContext: Number of successful cards you want to appear in the draw.

formulas.combination: function combination(n, k) { if (k < 0 || k > n) return 0; if (k === 0 || k === n) return 1; if (k > n - k) k = n - k; let result = 1; for (let i = 1; i <= k; i++) { result *= (n - k + i) / i; } return result; }
formulas.numerator: combination(successesInDeck, successesWanted) * combination(deckSize - successesInDeck, draws - successesWanted)
